Special considerations
An enhanced version of this file (MBSF Base A/B/C/D V2) is available starting with the 2023 enrollment year. When requesting 2023 data, researchers will receive both the current MBSF Base A/B/C/D and the new V2 files. The current MBSF Base A/B/C/D file will no longer be produced starting
